en: Hello, Sweetie. Can you hear me? Do pick up.
Your Royal Highness. Hello, Sweetie. Your Majesty.
Yes. Not me, I'm afraid. I'm Darling or Cabbage. Sweetie is someone else.
Ah, you see? It works. You asked to see me?
ko: 잘 되네요. 저를 보고 싶다고 하셨죠?

en: So, I've spoken to Colonel Adean. Yes.
And Martin Charteris. Yes. And William Heseltine.
ko: 그리고 마틴 차터리스와요. 네? 그리고 윌리엄 헤셀타인과요.
